docs.name: ShootingStarsGrid
docs.description: A cinematic hero-section background: a faint grid bathed in dark-emerald glow, with thin white streaks that race along grid lanes like falling stars. Built on Motion.dev with compositor-only transforms for smooth 60fps.

props.name: starCount
props.description: Number of concurrent shooting-star streaks. Clamped to 1–80.

props.name: speed
props.description: Base travel duration in seconds. Each star is randomised ±30% around this value.

props.name: glowStrength
props.description: Multiplier (0–1) applied to the streak's box-shadow intensity.

props.name: gridSize
props.description: Pixel spacing between grid lines; streaks snap to these lanes.

props.name: direction
props.description: Axis streaks travel along. "both" picks per star randomly.

props.name: color
props.description: Streak colour. Pass a single CSS colour for a monochrome shower, an array of colours to sample from per star, or omit for the built-in multi-hue palette (white, mint, cyan, amber, pink, violet).

props.name: children
props.description: Optional content layered above the background at z-index 10.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional classes merged onto the outer container.

docs.overview: ShootingStarsGrid renders a full-bleed animated background suitable for hero sections. It stacks four layers: a near-black base (#020808), a subtle 80px grid drawn with two linear-gradients, a radial emerald glow, and a vignette that fades the outer edges to black. Shooting stars are motion.div elements whose positions snap to grid lanes; their animation uses only transform + opacity so they stay on the GPU compositor. Each star picks a hue from the default multi-colour palette (or from a custom colour/array passed via the `color` prop). Respects prefers-reduced-motion by rendering the grid alone.

scenarios.title: Hero-section background
scenarios.description: Drop ShootingStarsGrid behind a headline as a full-viewport hero background.

scenarios.title: Monochrome brand shower
scenarios.description: Pass a single colour to lock every streak to your brand hue.

scenarios.title: Custom palette
scenarios.description: Pass an array of colours to restrict the shower to a specific set of hues.

scenarios.title: Horizontal-only streaks
scenarios.description: Restrict streaks to the horizontal axis for a calmer, train-window feel.

scenarios.title: Dense, fast streaks for a launch moment
scenarios.description: Bump starCount and speed for a high-energy loader or splash screen.
